Typography

Sutairu provides a variety of typographic utilities for styling text semantically or with utility classes. Below is a reference of supported styles.

Style Example HTML Tag CSS Class
Bold Bold text <b> .bold
Italic Italic text <i> .italic
Abbreviation Abbr. <abbr> .td-abbr
Strikethrough Strikethrough <s> .td-lt
Underline Underline <u> .td-ul
No decoration Not underlined link - .td-none
Small Small <small> -
Monospace Monospace - .ff-mono
Inline code Inline Code <code> -
Keyboard Ctrl + F <kbd> -
Subscript Regularsub <sub> -
Superscript Regularsup <sub> -

The table above lists the core utilities that form the foundation of Sutairu’s typography. Additional typography utilities are available in the Extended Typography package.
